resources.string: Subscribe to channels to see their\nlatest videos here
Play videos and music on this device
Videos and music stored on this device will appear here.
Allow access to your media so Flow can find and play local videos and music.
This will remove all videos from your watch history. This action cannot be undone.
Videos you watch will appear here
Try a different search or filter
Videos you like will appear here
Songs you like will appear here
Download all %1$d videos? This may use significant storage.
Audio stream information not available yet.
This video is less than 2 minutes long. Would you like to switch to a specialized player?
Your downloaded %1$s will appear here.\nEnjoy your content even without internet.
Marked as watched — your recommendations will improve!
Got it! You\'ll see more content like this.
This video is scheduled. Playback will unlock when it goes live.
Jump into your latest subscribed channels.
Music channels are marked inline so the feed stays compact.
No groups yet. Create one to filter your feed.
Videos you save to watch later will appear here
You\'re all caught up! New updates from your subscriptions will appear here.

This will completely wipe your 'Flow Brain' interest profile.

• All learned topics will be forgotten.
• Personality traits will reset to neutral.
• Recommendations will return to default.

This action cannot be undone.
Pause learning — browse without influencing your profile
Keep watched videos in history (with progress). The engine still won\'t learn from them. Off = nothing is saved.
How long should learning stay paused?
Deep Flow stays active until you turn it off
Control which notifications Flow can send
Notify when subscribed channels upload new videos
Bedtime and break reminders from Time Management
Get notified when a new version of Flow is available
Open Android settings to manage per-channel permissions
Allow Flow to wake up in the background for notification checks and alerts
How often Flow checks for new videos from your subscribed channels.
Block topics you don\'t want to see
Route remote traffic through HTTP or SOCKS5
Video resolution and music audio quality
Use your device language or choose one manually
Restore from backup or import from other apps
Help support the development of Flow
Set every role with hex values and preview instantly
Choose which theme is used when your device switches between light and dark mode.
Choose a launcher icon style. The change takes effect immediately and the launcher will briefly refresh.
Heads up: switching icons uses an Android system mechanism that may briefly remove the app shortcut from your home screen. Long-press the launcher to add it back if needed.
Icon updated - your launcher will refresh
Select the visual style of the seek bar
Swipe left/right edge to adjust brightness and volume in fullscreen
Swipe the left edge in fullscreen to adjust brightness
Reuse your last player brightness level for the next videos
Swipe the right edge in fullscreen to adjust volume
Choose the temporary speed used while holding the player
Show rewind/forward 10s buttons on the mini player
Show next and previous video buttons on the mini player
Use the video format for player height. Turn off for fixed 16:9.
Display the video title below the top bar while in fullscreen mode
Choose your preferred source for song lyrics
Choose how videos are displayed on the home screen
Controls the size of album art and content cards
Display related videos below the video player
Show personalized video recommendations on the home screen
Personalized recommendations are turned off. You can re-enable this in Content Settings.
Choose how related videos appear in the player panel
Thumbnail and info side by side
How many lines to show for video titles in the player
Show thumbs up / thumbs down buttons on video cards to quickly tune your recommendations
Video card mark as watched button
Show an eye button on full and compact video cards to quickly mark videos as watched
Display the Flow logo icon next to the app name in the home screen top bar
Filter videos you\'ve already watched from your home feed and subscriptions
Play all videos (including YouTube Shorts) in the regular video player
Show a globe icon in the Explore screen top bar to instantly change the trending region.
Load and show the comments section on the video player screen
Show the latest comment inside the comments card
Check your subscription feed when the app opens
Show how many videos were checked beside the last refresh time
Show regular videos in the subscription feed
Show Shorts in the subscription feed
Show live and recently ended streams in the subscription feed
Use arrows to rearrange tabs. Select the default tab with the radio button.
Show the horizontal shorts shelf in the subscription feed grid.
Show the horizontal shorts shelf on the home screen.
Show the Shorts tab in the bottom navigation bar.
Show the Music tab in the bottom navigation bar.
Show a quick-access Search tab in the bottom navigation bar.
Show a Trending & Categories explore tab in the bottom navigation bar.
Show a shelf of in-progress videos on the home screen.
Automatically pop up the last watched video
Configure an optional HTTP or SOCKS5 proxy for remote requests. Local casting and LAN discovery stay direct.
Use the configured proxy for remote network traffic
Leave username and password empty for unauthenticated proxies.
Active downloads or long-lived playback requests may need a restart before they fully adopt a new proxy route.
Enter a proxy host before enabling the proxy.
Enter a valid proxy port between 1 and 65535.
Continue playing when app is in background
Continue playing Shorts when app is in background
Auto Play Next (advance to next short)
Choose how Shorts should behave when the current short finishes playing:
Apply the last used playback speed to videos
Fetch dislike counts from the Return YouTube Dislike service
Set your own speed presets for the player
Enter a valid speed between 0.1 and 10.0
No presets added. Add one below.
Use a continuous slider to set any playback speed
Normalize audio volume for consistent playback
Replace clickbait titles and thumbnails with community alternatives
Display a badge on thumbnails corrected by DeArrow
Segment actions, DeArrow controls, and dislike count settings
Show a button in the player to submit new segments
Tap to set or generate a user ID
Enter a custom user ID or leave blank to auto-generate one. Your ID is used to track segment submissions.
Failed to submit segment. Please try again.
Show manual PiP button in player controls
Continue playback during phone or VoIP calls (e.g. WhatsApp)
Select your preferred audio track language. If not available, the original language will be used.
Uses the video\'s native audio track

Choose which codec is used by default at the selected resolution. This does not change which qualities are listed — you can still pick any codec from the quality selector. H.264 is the most compatible and smoothest on most devices; AV1/VP9 save data at higher resolutions but need more decoding power.
Choose how many seconds to seek when double-tapping the left or right side of the player.
Configure video buffering behavior to optimize for your network connection.
Balanced start time and buffering (15s min, 50s max)
Prioritize quick playback start (10s min, 30s max)
Minimize data usage with smaller buffers (12s min)
Manually adjust buffer sizes. Higher values prevent stalling but may delay playback start.
Maximum disk space used to cache video and audio data. Takes effect after restarting the app.
Topics you\'ve selected help Flow recommend better content. Tap topics below to add or remove them.
Videos with these topics won\'t appear in your recommendations. You can also use the \"Not Interested\" button on videos.
Track and control your screen time
Stats are based on your watch history across this app. Actual usage may vary.
A notification will be sent at start time.
Remind me to take a break
Get notified when it\'s time to sleep
Set reminders to balance your viewing habits
App will close when timer ends
Save your searches for quick access
Choose how many searches to keep:
Restore your history, settings, and subscriptions from a Flow backup file.
Import subscriptions from a NewPipe export file (JSON).
Import subscriptions from a LibreTube backup file (JSON).
Import video playlists from other apps
Import your NewPipe local playlists from a backup ZIP file.
Import your LibreTube local playlists from a backup JSON file.
Import your YouTube subscriptions, watch history, and playlists all at once from a Google Takeout ZIP file.
Import your music library from other players
Import music playlists from a Metrolist backup file (.zip). Playlists appear in your Music Library.
Import your watch history from a FreeTube export JSON file.
Import your watch history from a NewPipe backup ZIP or newpipe.db file.
Import additional data from YouTube Takeout
Import your watch history from YouTube Takeout (watch-history.html).
Import a playlist from YouTube Takeout CSV (Playlist-<name>.csv).
Import a music playlist from YouTube Music Takeout CSV. Appears under Music Playlists.
Imported %1$d entries from your YouTube watch history
No watch history entries found in this file. Make sure it is a YouTube Takeout watch-history.html file.
No videos found in this CSV. Make sure it is a YouTube Takeout playlist CSV file.
Not granted — tap to enable for full download listing
Download files in multiple chunks for max speed.
Using more threads can increase speed but may use more battery and heat up the device.
Choose where downloaded files are saved on your device.
Private to the app — files may be deleted if you uninstall
Pick any folder using the system file picker
If you find Flow useful and would like to support its development, you can support it on Patreon or donate via the crypto addresses below. Your support helps keep the project alive!
Flow is free, open-source, and built without ads or trackers. If it has earned a place on your device, please consider supporting its development — it genuinely helps keep the project alive.
Patreon · Bitcoin · Ethereum · Solana · USDT · Monero
Create your first playlist to organize your favorite videos
Add videos from the video player\nto build your playlist
This will permanently delete \'%1$s\' and all its videos.
They will be removed from this playlist.
They will be removed from Watch later.
Tell us what you\'re interested in
Select at least 3 topics to personalize your experience
Full transparency on what drives your feed
How your interests shift by time of day
Implicit feedback from your viewing history

This will permanently erase:

• All learned preferences
• Long-term personality vector
• Time-context patterns
• Channel affinity scores

Your feed will return to a cold-start state.
Watch some videos to populate your interest nebula!
No playlists yet. Create one to get started!
Curated playlist of %1$s music from our community
Create your first playlist to organize your favorite tracks
Tap the heart icon on any track to add it to your favorites
Start listening to music to see your history here
Higher quality uses more data. Shorts use vertical video streams.
Insert at start of video queue
Add to end of video queue
No active video queue. Start playing a video first.
No compatible audio stream — download cannot proceed
Choose how the download dialog looks
Full list of every quality and codec
Editable title, dropdowns and thread count
Remove %1$d paused, failed, or partial download(s)? Completed downloads will not be touched.
Tap to check for the latest version
Couldn\'t check for updates. Check your connection.
Back up your AI personality & learning data
Restore your AI personality profile from a backup file
Export brain and app data in one file
Restore both app data and engine profile from a single master backup file
Schedule automatic backups to a folder
Select what you want to export and save to your device
Export your subscriptions as a NewPipe-compatible JSON file.
Export your subscriptions, watch history, playlists, and settings
This video is only available to signed-in users who have verified their age.
The owner of this video has set it to private.
The content owner has restricted this video in your country. Try using a VPN.
This video requires a purchase or rental on YouTube.
This track is only available to YouTube Music Premium subscribers.
This channel no longer exists on YouTube.
YouTube is asking for bot verification. Please open YouTube in a browser and solve the CAPTCHA, then try again.
This video may have been deleted, made private, or removed by YouTube.
This format or content type cannot be played in Flow.
Check your Wi-Fi or mobile data and try again.
The server took too long to respond. Check your connection and try again.
A network issue prevented the video from loading. Check your connection and try again.
YouTube refused to serve this stream. The video link may have expired — try reloading.
YouTube returned an unexpected response (%1$s). Try again in a moment.
The video stream could not be read. This may be a temporary YouTube issue.
Your device could not decode this stream. Try selecting a lower quality.
An unexpected player error occurred. Please try again.
YouTube may have updated its format. Flow will be updated soon — please try again later.
An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
Music stream access was denied. YouTube may be limiting this IP; try reloading or switching network/VPN.
Music stream failed because of a network issue. Check your connection or try another network.
This song could not be loaded after several retries. Try another network or VPN if songs keep failing.
Music playback failed. Try again or switch networks if this keeps happening.
Show cast button on the video player overlay
Show CC button on the video player overlay
Show PiP button on the video player overlay
Automatically enter PiP mode when you leave the app. Turn off to use PiP only via the manual button.
Show autoplay toggle on the video player overlay
Show sleep timer button on the video player overlay
Show a player lock button to block accidental touches
Show the current speed on the video player overlay
View error logs and crash reports
All saved crash reports will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
No warnings or errors in this session.
No playlists yet. Create one first!
Higher maturity means the profile has enough signals to be stable
Global profile compared with the active time context
Higher values lean toward longer videos
How much live content fits the profile
Highest weighted topics after probation and evidence checks
Swipe through weekday and weekend context vectors
Queries and guardrails currently shaping exploration
Topics and channels excluded from recommendations
Backup, restore, or reset the local recommendation profile
Save the current profile as JSON
Erase learned preferences and start fresh
This clears the local recommendation profile and starts learning again from zero.
Customize how upload dates are shown
Override the time display for specific places. \"Default\" follows the setting above.
When off, the volume swipe gesture stops at the maximum system volume. Turn on to make audio even louder.
Export as YouTube-history JSON (imports into LibreTube and Flow)
This removes all Shorts from your watch history. Other videos are kept.
